mapper.sql:
FROM TWORK_MST_BOX BOX INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select:
/* wms-master-boxmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectBoxMgmtList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , BOX.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , BOX.BOXDIVCD , BOX.BOXNM , BOX.BOXBARCODE , BOX.WIDTH , BOX.DEPTH , BOX.HEIGHT , BOX.CBMSTARTRNG , BOX.CBMCLOSRNG , BOX.USEYN , BOX.INSERTDATE , BOX.INSERTURKEY , BOX.UPDATEDATE , BOX.UPDATEURKEY

/* wms-master-boxmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectBoxMgmtMap */ SELECT BOX.CTKEY , CT.CTNM , BOX.BOXDIVCD , BOX.BOXNM , BOX.BOXBARCODE , IC.ICKEY , IC.ICNM , BOX.WIDTH , BOX.DEPTH , BOX.HEIGHT , BOX.CBMSTARTRNG , BOX.CBMCLOSRNG , BOX.USEYN , BOX.INSERTDATE , BOX.INSERTURKEY , BOX.UPDATEDATE , BOX.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_BOX BOX INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = BOX.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = BOX.ICKEY WHERE BOX.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND BOX.BOXBARCODE = #{boxbarcode}

/* wms-master-boxmgmt-sql-oracle.xml - selectInfoBoxDlvryList */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , DLVRY.CTKEY , DLVRY.BOXBARCODE , DLVRY.DLVRYCORPCD , DLVRY.DLVRYCORPCD AS ORG_DLVRYCORPCD , DLVRY.BOXTYPECD , DLVRY.DLVRYAMT , DLVRY.INSERTDATE , DLVRY.INSERTURKEY , DLVRY.UPDATEDATE , DLVRY.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_BOX_DLVRY DLVRY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = DLVRY.CTKEY WHERE DLVRY.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND DLVRY.BOXBARCODE = #{boxbarcode}
